content.rendered:
Turtle View 06

  • Porters, St. James
  • 6 guests
  • 3 bedroom
  • 2 bathroom

Welcome to Turtle View 6, your peaceful vacation home nestled within a serene gated community of 10 beautiful townhomes. If location is what you desire, then look no further – the townhome is perfectly situated just a short, leisurely 5-minute stroll away from the nearest beach (Alleynes Bay) and a delightful array of restaurants, including the famous Lonsestar, Jumas, and Jujus. Prepare to immerse yourself in the very essence of location and convenience!

The open-plan living space seamlessly blends a modern, fully-equipped kitchen with a spacious lounge area, providing the ideal setting for unwinding with loved ones or simply basking in your own company. For those who can’t quite escape work obligations, fear not – we’ve thoughtfully provided a dedicated office space, ensuring you can attend to your tasks while surrounded by tranquility.

The upper floor where three generously sized, air-conditioned bedrooms await. Each room is thoughtfully designed to provide a peaceful sanctuary for restful nights. The master bedroom boasts an en-suite bathroom, ensuring you have all the comfort and privacy you need during your stay.

Step out onto the inviting covered patio and discover your own private garden oasis, a true sanctuary of relaxation. Here, you can savor the island breeze, bask in the warm sun, or perhaps enjoy an al fresco meal as you take in the lush surroundings.

But that’s not all – get ready to rejuvenate yourself in your very own private plunge pool. Whether you’re seeking a refreshing dip to start your day or a leisurely soak to unwind in the evening, this pool is exclusively yours to enjoy at any hour. You also get to enjoy at the large communal pool as well.

Charges additional to the rate:

> Cleaning fee (sweeping, dusting, cleaning) of US150.00

> Laundry fee $60/ stay

> During stay laundry fee (optional) US$ 10/ load

Please note that there is ongoing construction at a neighbouring property and noise may be heard from time to time.

Optional Grocery Pack

A complimentary grocery pack is available upon request only.
If you’d like to receive one, please select “Grocery Pack” under Additional Services on the booking confirmation page.

  1. A Large bottle of water
  2. Eggs
  3. Milk
  4. Cheese
  5. Butter
  6. Bread
  7. Tea/ Coffee

Our Guests, Their Words

Our guests' words capture the beauty and comfort of Barbados living.

view all reviews on airbnb
Absolutely perfect from start to finish. Maisha was so helpful. The villa is stunning and...
Absolutely perfect from start to finish. Maisha was so helpful. The villa is stunning and has everything you need, location is perfect. Loved it.
 

Danny

December 2024 · Stayed about a week

We had a gorgeous stay at Turtle View. Excellent well equipped house. Pictures don’t do...

We had a gorgeous stay at Turtle View. Excellent well equipped house. Pictures don’t do it justice, much spacier then shown, plunge pool is bigger than expected as is communal pool which is very close to house. Very safe and clean environment to be in. The two main room are huge as are the bathrooms and showers. Beds are super comfy and lovely linen. Air con works well in bedrooms. Kitchen has everything you need and a big fridge freezer.
Really close to beach and choice of different places to eat. Buses stop at bottom of road making it very easy to get anywhere you wish and Holetown can be walked if you fancy it. We travelled with out 3 year, it was perfect. Maisha and her team went above to ensure our stay was successful.
Thank you. Can’t wait to come back.

Suzi

December 2023 · Stayed over a week

We had an incredible 2 weeks at Maishas place - it was exactly as described,...

We had an incredible 2 weeks at Maishas place - it was exactly as described, spacious & spotlessly clean. The location is really hard to beat: peaceful and super close to one of the nicest beaches on the island but still only 5 mins drive from Holetown & it's amenities. The back porch was lovely to eat on & watch the birds & monkeys in the trees and the plunge pool was perfect to cool down in.
Such a great base for a holiday, I wouldn't hesitate to recommend it or stay again if possible!!

Mark

2 weeks ago · Stayed over a week
